example: Would you like to donate, Princess Ebony?
You think this is some kind of place where you can go to ask for handouts or something?
This is the palace?
It would be incredibly encouraging if you showed them your support.
zh: 鼓舞人心的，令人振奮的

example: Finish the tasks assigned to you and then start work on the fireplace.
Can I at least have a bonus for Christmas?
I want the chimney swept before nightfall.
zh: 掃除，清掃（sweep 的過去式）

example: Years of anger, disdain and selfishness can really wear on a person.
Years of anger, disdain and selfishness can really wear on a person.
I like my money and my solitude.
I'm a ghost.
We're going on an adventure you and me.
Is it the night of our engagement?
You spend every day and every night in your treasury.
Counting your coins and budgeting your spending.
We all need to earn our wage and our luxuries in this kingdom.
He paid for Bobby's mother's medicine.
Please know more hauntings. I can't take it.
Change your ways so that you do not leave this life with regrets.
And I have this for you as well. The Christmas bonus you requested.
Respectfully, of course.
